message:
test(theme_studio): add comprehensive unit tests (bd-vu0o.3)

Adds 35 unit tests covering:

Initialization:
- new_creates_valid_instance, default_same_as_new
- token_list_has_expected_categories

Contrast Ratio & WCAG:
- contrast_ratio_calculation, symmetric, same_color
- wcag_rating_thresholds, boundary_values

Color Formatting:
- color_hex_format, black, white, always_uppercase

Export:
- export_json_produces_valid_output
- export_json_contains_all_color_keys, hex_format

Navigation:
- focus_toggle_cycles, tab_toggles_focus
- preset_navigation_up/down_saturates
- token_navigation_requires_focus
- vim_navigation_j/k

Theme Application:
- enter_applies_preset, ctrl_t_cycles_theme
- e_key_triggers_export, shift_e_key
- export_status_clears_on_next_key

Screen Trait:
- title_is_theme_studio, tab_label_is_themes
- keybindings_not_empty, contain_expected_keys
- tick_updates_tick_count

Edge Cases:
- update_ignores_non_key_events, key_release
- unhandled_keys_do_not_panic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
